detail.instructions: Refactor the existing reorder_notes helper into a clearer shape. Use a small loop and named intermediate values so the inventory priority rule is obvious.

hints.body: The goal is not always fewer lines.
Name a boolean such as is_inventory_note if that makes the rule clearer.
A loop is idiomatic when each step deserves a name.

detail.completionExplanation: Idiomatic Rust values clarity over using an iterator chain everywhere. The best shape is the one that makes the business rule easiest to verify.
